mapper.update: create table KUAI_INTERFACE_CONF ( ID VARCHAR2(32) default sys_guid() not null, TABLES NVARCHAR2(2000), TABLETYPE NVARCHAR2(10), ALIAS VARCHAR2(200) unique, REMARK NVARCHAR2(100), CLASSIFY NVARCHAR2(32), KEYS NVARCHAR2(2000), SETVALUE NVARCHAR2(500), VERIFY NVARCHAR2(2000), ROLES NVARCHAR2(100), FIELD NVARCHAR2(500), WHERES NVARCHAR2(500), ISCX VARCHAR2(10) default 0, ISXG VARCHAR2(10) default 0, ISSC VARCHAR2(10) default 0, AFTER NVARCHAR2(2000), FRONT NVARCHAR2(2000), LISTCONF NVARCHAR2(2000), FORMCONF NVARCHAR2(2000), STATE VARCHAR2(1) default 0, ADDTIME DATE default sysdate )

create table KUAI_INTERFACE_CONF ( ID VARCHAR(50) not null, TABLES VARCHAR(2000), TABLETYPE VARCHAR(10), ALIAS VARCHAR(200) unique, REMARK VARCHAR(100), CLASSIFY VARCHAR(32), `KEYS` VARCHAR(2000), VERIFY VARCHAR(2000), SETVALUE VARCHAR(500), ROLES VARCHAR(100), FIELD VARCHAR(500), WHERES VARCHAR(500), ISCX VARCHAR(10) default 0, ISXG VARCHAR(10) default 0, ISSC VARCHAR(10) default 0, AFTER VARCHAR(2000), FRONT VARCHAR(2000), LISTCONF VARCHAR(2000), FORMCONF VARCHAR(2000), STATE VARCHAR(1) default 0, ADDTIME datetime default now() )
create table KUAI_FILE_STORE ( ID VARCHAR2(50), PATH VARCHAR2(50), NAME VARCHAR2(200), ISDELETE NUMBER(1) default 0, FILESIZE NUMBER, CREATETIME TIMESTAMP(6) default sysdate, DELTIME TIMESTAMP(6) )
create table KUAI_FILE_STORE ( ID VARCHAR(50), PATH VARCHAR(50), NAME VARCHAR(200), ISDELETE int(1) default 0, FILESIZE int, CREATETIME datetime default now(), DELTIME datetime )

create table KUAI_AUTHORITY_CONF ( ID VARCHAR2(32) default sys_guid() not null, CODE VARCHAR2(200) unique, NAME NVARCHAR2(100), SYSVAR NVARCHAR2(500), ROLES NVARCHAR2(2000), STATE VARCHAR2(1) default 0, ADDTIME DATE default sysdate )

create table KUAI_AUTHORITY_CONF ( ID VARCHAR(50) not null, CODE VARCHAR(200) unique, NAME VARCHAR(100), SYSVAR VARCHAR(2000), ROLES VARCHAR(2000), STATE VARCHAR(1) default 0, ADDTIME datetime default now() )
